fix(TASK-68): session times display in venue timezone not UTC

Set IANA timezone identifiers on seeded conferences based on venue location:
- TechConf 2023 (New York, NY) → America/New_York
- DevSummit 2025 (Chicago, IL) → America/Chicago
- TechConf 2026 (San Francisco, CA) → America/Los_Angeles

The API, DTOs, and frontend were already wired up correctly; the seed data
simply never populated the Timezone field, so every conference fell back to
the model default of "UTC".

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: sync backlog task metadata [ralph]

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: sync script uses REST API exclusively — no more GraphQL dependency

- Pre-flight check: core.remaining instead of graphql.remaining
- ensure_label: gh api REST GET/POST instead of gh label list --json
- Issue lookup: gh api REST instead of gh issue list --json
- State check: gh api REST instead of gh issue view --json
- Title search: gh api /search/issues REST endpoint
- Manual sync: closed stale issues for Done tasks, created #128-132 for TASK-66..70
- Wrote back github_issue fields to TASK-55/60/62/63 task files

Fixes TASK-71

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

perf: optimize find-by-query hot paths in RxDB core (#8066)

* Initial plan

* perf: optimize find-by-query performance in RxDB core

- Lazy _propertyCache initialization in RxDocument to avoid Map creation for unused docs
- Faster sort comparator using inline comparison for string/number types
- Optimized getHeightOfRevision with indexOf + charCodeAt fast path
- Cached byRev key string in doc cache to avoid duplicate computation
- Faster now() using Math.round instead of parseFloat(toFixed)
- Removed unnecessary wrapper object allocations in event-reduce query params

Co-authored-by: pubkey <8926560+pubkey@users.noreply.github.com>

* perf: address code review feedback - add bounds check in getHeightOfRevision, fix _propertyCache type

Co-authored-by: pubkey <8926560+pubkey@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: pubkey <8926560+pubkey@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: use newRxError('SNH') instead of throw new Error in getHeightOfRevision

Co-authored-by: pubkey <8926560+pubkey@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: pubkey <8926560+pubkey@users.noreply.github.com>
